title: A Fleeting Glimpse Of A Village.
content:
("Tout vit! et se pose avec gr�ce.")


    How graceful the picture! the life, the repose!
    The sunbeam that plays on the porchstone wide;
    And the shadow that fleets o'er the stream that flows,
    And the soft blue sky with the hill's green side.

    Fraser's Magazine.
meaning:
Victor-Marie Hugo's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "A Fleeting Glimpse Of A Village."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
